byJennifer Weiser

Missouri Capitol Police officers and other members of law enforcement were running in the streets of downtown Jefferson City on Wednesday.

(Video from Missouri Capitol Police's X post.)

The Law Enforcement Torch Run supports the Special Olympics of Missouri, a day before the start of the Special Olympics Missouri Summer Games.

The State Summer Games will be from Friday, May 31, until Sunday, June 2, in Columbia at Battle High School and MizzouRec.



Friday’s Opening Ceremony will be held at the MizzouRec, instead of on the Carnahan Quad.

2025Sinclair, Inc.
